# Resonance — Card Set Distribution

*Regenerated by `tools/update-card-distribution.py` (wrapped as `make card-distribution`) and by the `card-cluster` skill after each approved cluster.*

Target (per `design/Supplement.md §4`, for a 250-card set):

- Common:   44% (110 cards)
- Uncommon: 32% (80 cards)
- Rare:     18% (45 cards)
- Mythic:    6% (15 cards)
